posts.author: CraftyClayAndCandles
posts.text: Finally got around to making a batch of beeswax candles today! The scent is absolutely divine, and I managed to twist them into some unique shapes. Can't wait to see how they look when lit. #HomeDecor #DIY
posts.explanation: This post is a harmless personal update about a hobby (candle making) with no threats, private details, or harmful misinformation; it fits standard lifestyle content.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: ElaraJenkins
posts.text: Honestly annoyed by these new government restrictions on local businesses. They're trying to shut down small shops in Oakhaven while letting the big chains operate freely. It's completely unfair! #LocalLife #BusinessRights
posts.explanation: The post expresses a natural opinion and complaint about government policy without containing threats, targeted abuse or harmful false claims.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: LibraryLover82
posts.text: Just spotted a handy notice on the app about the new community garden opening in Northbridge next week! The library will be hosting free guided tours starting at 10am every Saturday. Perfect for anyone looking to get involved with local green spaces. #CommunityGarden #Northbridge
posts.explanation: This is a benign community notice promoting a public event; no sensitive data, threats or scams are present, so it meets criteria for approval.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.

posts.author: MorganVale79
posts.text: Quick update on my account! If you need any payment assistance or want to check your details, please DM me directly with your password and security code to verify it's the right person. Don't worry, I'm just helping out! [link removed] #Support #PaymentUpdate
posts.explanation: This post solicits sensitive credentials (password/security code) and private data under the guise of verification, which is a clear credential-harvesting scam requiring removal.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: BellmereWatcher72
posts.text: URGENT: The Bank of Greyford has been compromised! This official-looking PDF confirms all deposits are frozen and you must transfer funds to this emergency wallet NOW to save your money. Do not ignore this or your account will be permanently blocked. #FinancialAlert #BankingCrisis [link removed]
posts.explanation: This post spreads a specific financial warning relying on an unverified document, which could cause a run on banks and requires specialist escalation to FinancialEconomic.

posts.author: FestivalFanatic42
posts.text: Big news for our local area! The annual Bellmere Community Festival is happening this weekend, featuring live music, food stalls and a craft exhibition. It's going to be a brilliant day out for everyone. #CommunityEvents
posts.explanation: This post is a harmless announcement for a fictional event with no safety or privacy concerns.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.

posts.author: SunnySideUp84
posts.text: Lovely sunny weather today! I took the dog for a walk around the local park in Dunmere and met our neighbour, Mrs Higgins, who's been struggling with her garden lately. She mentioned she'd appreciate some help clearing the overgrown path near the gate if anyone has a spare pair of hands. The view from the top of the hill is just stunning! #NeighbourlyHelp
posts.explanation: This post shares a harmless, positive community interaction and a request for casual assistance with no policy violations.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: CulinarySoul79
posts.text: Just finished making my own sourdough starter using flour from the local mill in Westbridge! The smell is incredible and I can't wait to bake a loaf tonight. Also re-watching that classic film series on the platform, it's such a comforting watch. #BakingLife #FilmNights
posts.explanation: The post shares harmless hobbies (baking, film watching) and fictional location details without soliciting private information or promoting harm.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: JulesAndPenny
posts.text: Honestly, my boss is being such a pain today. He keeps sending me these ridiculous requests to reorganise the entire department at 6pm and then gets annoyed when I ask for a deadline extension. It's completely unmanageable! #WorkLife #Frustrated
posts.explanation: The post expresses mild workplace frustration regarding unrealistic demands but contains no abuse, private information, or safety concerns; therefore it should be Approved.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: RiverWalkNotes
posts.text: Someone on the platform is being incredibly rude about my recent posts, calling me names and refusing to accept any feedback. I've tried blocking them but they keep finding ways to reply with more insults. It's getting exhausting dealing with this behaviour.
posts.explanation: This post reports harassment without directing a pile-on or revealing private information, so it is correctly approved as user commentary.
